prompt: Vertical editorial photograph of an overstuffed real-life women's wardrobe: a single rail packed with clothes, cluttered and a bit chaotic, several pieces slipping off hangers. Balanced everyday palette mostly neutral (cream, oat, taupe, dusty rose, soft blue) but lifted with a fair amount of real colour and mixed prints woven through, not dominating: some red stripe, gingham, floral, a touch of mustard. Colour present and lively but natural, not neon or fully saturated, and no big flat blocks of pure red. A moderate pile of several fallen garments on the floor below, more than a couple but less than a mountain. Soft natural daylight, realistic true colour, the feeling of too many clothes and nothing to wear. Candid documentary photography, fine fabric texture, no text, no logos, no faces.
